answer.en: HTML decoding converts HTML entities (like <, &, ") back to their original characters (<, &, ").

question.en: When would I need to HTML decode?

answer.en: You might need to HTML decode when extracting text from HTML content, processing HTML stored in a database, or debugging HTML entity issues.

question.en: What are the most common HTML entities?
Does HTML decoding only handle named entities?

answer.en: This tool handles both named entities (&, <, etc.) and numeric entities (<, <, etc.).

description.en: All processing runs locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
